loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD (thd_compliance_i_avg) and voltage THD (thd_compliance_v_avg) as proxies for harmonic distortion; voltage THD columns failed validation so compliance average is used. Flicker, Crest Factor, and H5/H7 specific values are not directly measured by this meter's validated columns, so they are left blank or proxied where possible.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD trends; voltage THD columns (thd_voltage_*) failed validation on this meter and are omitted.
